title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India International Enterprises - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Domino's India International Enterprises - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Domino's India International Enterprises in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Domino's India International Enterprises:
Domino's India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Domino's India International Enterprises!
